variants: Sofiane Ait-Ouara is a talented inventor residing in Copperbloom Harbor. He is well-known for his creation of the Vaporlock Stasis Device, which has garnered attention in the engineering community. His innovative work earned him the prestigious Juniper Sigil Honors, recognizing his significant contributions to technology. A dedicated member of the Marigold Climber Association, Sofiane enjoys sharing his knowledge and passion for climbing with others. Originally hailing from Gingerbark Fields, he has made a remarkable name for himself in his current home.

Sofiane is also an active participant in the Marigold Climber Association, where he indulges in his passion for climbing. His contributions to both innovation and community have solidified his reputation in the region. With a growing legacy, Sofiane continues to inspire those around him.
